chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 2045, 2046 & 2047 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For Order on CMA No. 627/2023. (Condonation) 2. For order on office objection No. 14. 3. For order on CMA No. 628/2023 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For order on CMA No. 629/2023 (Stay) 21.11.2025 None present Perusal of these references demonstrates that prima facie the same are time barred. These references are pending since 2023 and even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Applicant remains unrepresented today without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
